title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: Z AI launched Z Code, a Codex-like coding agent built for GLM models. It offers a free tier with 5 million tokens per day for GLM-5.2, featuring task execution, code generation, project preview, and DevTools integration.
writeup: The video covers Z AI's launch of Z Code, a Codex-like coding agent built for GLM models, and its pairing with GLM-5.2. The free tier provides 5 million tokens per day for GLM-5.2, which matters for anyone weighing the cost of agentic coding tools. Concrete features include task execution, code generation, project preview, and DevTools integration.
